---
title: "GDP and Volunteer Count's Effect on Cleanup Efficiency"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    theme: superhero
    logo: logo.png
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/srkanneg1/project-1
      - icon: instagram
        href: https://www.instagram.com/breakfreefromplastic/
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:news@breakfreefromplastic.org
embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
api_key <- "pAenxf1sLGwSsVahXFyooRNOEEYZBpWScCPqmNDI"
library(httr)
library(tidyjson)
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(countrycode)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(gt)
library(scales)
library(ggalluvial)
library(httr2)

tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2021-01-26')
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2021, week = 5)
plastics <- tuesdata$plastics

get_region <- function(region) {
  url <- glue("https://restcountries.com/v3.1/region/{region}?fields=name,population,region")

  res <- GET(url)
  stop_for_status(res)

  txt <- content(res, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  df <- fromJSON(txt, flatten = TRUE)

  as_tibble(df) %>%
    transmute(
      country_api = coalesce(name.common, name.official),
      region = region,
      population = population
    )
}

region_list <- c("africa","americas","asia","europe","oceania")

country_region_lookup <- map_dfr(region_list, get_region)

plastic_data_clean <- plastics %>%
  mutate(
    country_clean = str_squish(country),
    country_clean = recode(
      country_clean,
      "USA" = "United States",
      "US" = "United States",
      "UK" = "United Kingdom",
      "Czech Republic" = "Czechia",
      "Republic of the Congo" = "Congo",
      "Democratic Republic of the Congo" = "DR Congo",
      .default = country_clean
    )
  )

lookup_clean <- country_region_lookup %>%
  mutate(country_clean = str_squish(country_api))

plastic_with_region <- plastic_data_clean %>%
  left_join(
    lookup_clean %>% select(country_clean, region, population),
    by = "country_clean"
  )

get_GDP <- function (country, key = api_key) {
  
  url <- glue(
    "https://api.api-ninjas.com/v1/gdp?country={country}&year=;X-Api-Key={key}"
    )
  my_data <- safely(fromJSON)(url)
  if (is.null(my_data$result)) {
    return(NA)
  } else {
    return(my_data$result)
  }
}

countries <-unique(plastics$country)
results <- map(countries, get_GDP)

bad_countries <- countries[map_lgl(results, ~ length(.x) == 0 || (length(.x) == 1 && is.na(.x)))]

bad_country_code <- c("BF","CI","HK","ZA","LK","TW","AE","GB","US","SV","KR","GB")

results_2 <- map(bad_country_code, get_GDP)

mod_df <- plastics[!(plastics$country %in% bad_countries), ]

results <- map(unique(mod_df$country), get_GDP)

total_results <- bind_rows(results, results_2)

tr_2019 <- total_results[total_results$year %in% c(2019), ]

plastic_cols <- c(
  "hdpe",
  "ldpe",
  "o",
  "pet",
  "pp",
  "ps",
  "pvc"
)
dominant_df <- plastics |>
  filter(year == 2019) |>
  group_by(country) |>
  summarize(
    across(all_of(plastic_cols), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    dominant_type = plastic_cols[which.max(c_across(all_of(plastic_cols)))],
    iso = countrycode(country, "country.name", "iso3c")
  ) |>
  ungroup()

tr_2019_small <- tr_2019 |>
  dplyr::select(1, gdp_per_capita_nominal) |>
  rename(iso = 1) |>
  distinct(iso, .keep_all = TRUE)

dominant_gdp <- dominant_df |>
  inner_join(tr_2019_small, by = "iso") |>
  mutate(
    gdp_group = case_when(
      gdp_per_capita_nominal < 1200 ~ "Low",
      gdp_per_capita_nominal < 14000 ~ "Middle",
      TRUE ~ "High"
    ),
    gdp_group = factor(gdp_group, levels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))
  )

bar_data <- dominant_gdp |>
  count(gdp_group, dominant_type)
```

## Column {width=50%}

### How does a country’s GDP status relate to its dominant plastic type?

```{r}
ggplot(bar_data,
       aes(axis1 = gdp_group, axis2 = dominant_type, y = n)) +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = dominant_type), width = 1/12) +
  geom_stratum(width = 1/12, fill = "grey90", color = "grey40") +
  geom_text(stat = "stratum", aes(label = after_stat(stratum))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "#4FC1E9","#ED5565","#FFCE54","#48CFAD",
    "#AC92EC","#5D9CEC","#A0D468"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Flow of Countries from GDP Group to Dominant Plastic Type",
    subtitle = "Width of flows represents number of countries",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Countries",
    fill = "Plastic Type",
    alt = "Alluvial plot showing the flow of countries from GDP groups (low, middle, high) to their dominant plastic types."
    ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10.5)
```

### Bottom Left Tabset

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Dominant Plastic Types
```{r}
dominant_summary <- dominant_df |>
  count(dominant_type, name = "Number of Countries") |>
  arrange(desc(`Number of Countries`))

dominant_summary |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Table 1: Most Common Dominant Plastic Types",
    subtitle = "Dominant plastic type by country in 2019"
  ) |>
  data_color(
    columns = `Number of Countries`,
    fn = scales::col_numeric(
      palette = c(
        "#4FC1E9","#ED5565","#FFCE54","#48CFAD",
        "#AC92EC","#5D9CEC","#A0D468"
      ),
      domain = dominant_summary$`Number of Countries`
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = `Number of Countries`,
    decimals = 0
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    dominant_type = "Dominant Plastic Type"
  ) |>
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = everything()
  )
```

## Regional Plastic Waste
```{r}
plastic_by_region <- plastic_with_region |>
  filter(!is.na(region)) |>
  group_by(region) |>
  summarise(
    total_plastic = sum(grand_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    countries_included = n_distinct(country),
    total_population = sum(population, na.rm = TRUE),
    plastic_per_capita = total_plastic / total_population,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(
    desc(
      total_plastic
      )
  )


plastic_by_region |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Table 2: Plastic Waste by Region",
    subtitle = "Total plastic vs. per capita distribution"
  ) |>
  data_color(
    columns = total_plastic,
    fn = scales::col_numeric(
      palette = c("#4FC1E9", "#5D9CEC", "#AC92EC"),
      domain = plastic_by_region$total_plastic
    )
  ) |>
  data_color(
    columns = plastic_per_capita,
    fn = scales::col_numeric(
      palette = c("#48CFAD", "#FFCE54", "#ED5565"),
      domain = plastic_by_region$plastic_per_capita
    )
  ) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(total_plastic, total_population),
    decimals = 0,
    use_seps = TRUE
  ) |>
  fmt_scientific(
  columns = plastic_per_capita,
  decimals = 2
) |>
  cols_label(
    region = "Region",
    total_plastic = "Total Plastic",
    countries_included = "Countries",
    total_population = "Population",
    plastic_per_capita = "Plastic per Capita"
  ) |>
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = everything()
  )
```

:::

## Column {width=50%}

### Right Side Tabset

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Focused Regional Summary
```{r}
get_region <- function(region) {
  url <- glue(
    "https://restcountries.com/v3.1/region/{region}?fields=name,population,region"
  )
  res <- GET(url)
  stop_for_status(res)
  txt <- content(res, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  df <- fromJSON(txt, flatten = TRUE)
  as_tibble(df) %>%
    transmute(
      country_api = coalesce(name.common, name.official),
      region = region,
      population = population
    )
}

country_region_lookup <- map_dfr(region_list, get_region) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(!is.na(country_api))

plastic_data_clean <- plastics %>%
  mutate(
    country_clean = str_squish(country),
    country_clean = recode(
      country_clean,
      "USA" = "United States",
      "US" = "United States",
      "UK" = "United Kingdom",
      "Czech Republic" = "Czechia",
      "Republic of the Congo" = "Congo",
      "Democratic Republic of the Congo" = "DR Congo",
      "Cote D_ivoire" = "Cote d'Ivoire",
      "Taiwan_ Republic of China (ROC)" = "Taiwan",
      .default = country_clean
    )
  )

lookup_clean <- country_region_lookup %>%
  mutate(country_clean = str_squish(country_api)) %>%
  mutate(
    country_clean = recode(
      country_clean,
      "United States of America" = "United States",
      "Russian Federation" = "Russia",
      "Korea (Republic of)" = "South Korea",
      "Côte d'Ivoire" = "Cote d'Ivoire",
      .default = country_clean
    )
  )

empty_gdp <- tibble(
  country = character(),
  year = integer(),
  gdp_per_capita_nominal = numeric()
)

get_GDP <- function(country, key = api_key) {
  req <- request("https://api.api-ninjas.com/v1/gdp") |>
    req_url_query(country = country, year = 2019) |>
    req_headers(`X-Api-Key` = key)

  resp <- tryCatch(req_perform(req), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(resp)) {
    return(empty_gdp)
  }

  out <- tryCatch(
    resp_body_json(resp, simplifyVector = TRUE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(out) || length(out) == 0) {
    return(empty_gdp)
  }

  as_tibble(out) %>%
    select(any_of(names(empty_gdp)))
}

results <- map_dfr(countries, get_GDP)

bad_country_lookup <- c(
  "Burkina Faso" = "BF",
  "Cote D_ivoire" = "CI",
  "Hong Kong" = "HK",
  "South Africa" = "ZA",
  "Sri Lanka" = "LK",
  "Taiwan_ Republic of China (ROC)" = "TW",
  "United Arab Emirates" = "AE",
  "United Kingdom" = "GB",
  "United States of America" = "US",
  "El Salvador" = "SV",
  "South Korea" = "KR"
)

matched <- unique(results$country)
missing_countries <- countries[
  !(countrycode(countries, "country.name", "iso3c", warn = FALSE) %in% matched)
]

results_2 <- map_dfr(missing_countries, function(ctry) {
  if (!(ctry %in% names(bad_country_lookup))) {
    return(empty_gdp)
  }
  code <- unname(bad_country_lookup[ctry])
  get_GDP(code)
})

total_results <- bind_rows(results, results_2) |>
  distinct(country, year, .keep_all = TRUE)

tr_2019 <- total_results |>
  filter(year == 2019)

plastics_2019_sum <- plastics |>
  filter(year == 2019) |>
  group_by(country) |>
  summarize(total_volunteers = sum(volunteers, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(iso = countrycode(country, "country.name", "iso3c", warn = FALSE))

combined_2019 <- inner_join(
  plastics_2019_sum,
  tr_2019,
  by = c("iso" = "country")
)

combined_2019 <- unique(combined_2019)

gdpbyregion <- combined_2019 %>%
  mutate(country_clean = countrycode(iso, "iso3c", "country.name", warn = FALSE)) %>%
  mutate(
    country_clean = recode(
      country_clean,
      "United States" = "United States",
      "United Kingdom" = "United Kingdom",
      "Czechia" = "Czechia",
      "South Korea" = "South Korea",
      .default = country_clean
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    lookup_clean %>% select(country_clean, region),
    by = "country_clean"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(region)) %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_gdp_per_capita = mean(gdp_per_capita_nominal, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_gdp_per_capita = median(gdp_per_capita_nominal, na.rm = TRUE),
    countries_included = n_distinct(iso),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_gdp_per_capita))

gdpbyregion_gt <- gdpbyregion %>%
  mutate(region = str_to_title(region)) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**GDP Summary by Region**")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    region = md("**Region**"),
    avg_gdp_per_capita = md("**Average GDP per Capita**"),
    median_gdp_per_capita = md("**Median GDP per Capita**"),
    countries_included = md("**Countries Included**")
  ) %>%
  fmt_currency(
    columns = c(avg_gdp_per_capita, median_gdp_per_capita),
    currency = "USD",
    decimals = 0
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = countries_included,
    decimals = 0,
    use_seps = TRUE
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(13),
    heading.title.font.weight = "bold",
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold"
  ) %>%
  opt_table_outline() %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md("A table showing average and median GDP per capita, along with the number of countries included, for each region.")
  )

gdpbyregion_gt
```

## Comprehensive Regional Data
```{r}
cleanupbyregion <- plastic_with_region %>%
  filter(!is.na(region), !is.na(num_events), num_events > 0) %>%
  split(.$region) %>%
  map_dfr(function(df) {
    tibble(
      region = first(df$region),
      total_plastic = sum(df$grand_total, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_events = sum(df$num_events, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_efficiency = total_plastic / total_events
    )
  }) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_efficiency))

region_model_data <- cleanupbyregion |>
  inner_join(gdpbyregion, by = "region")

region_model_data_gt <- region_model_data %>%
  mutate(region = str_to_title(region)) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Regional Model Data**")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    region = md("**Region**"),
    total_plastic = md("**Total Plastic**"),
    total_events = md("**Total Events**"),
    avg_efficiency = md("**Average Efficiency**"),
    avg_gdp_per_capita = md("**Average GDP per Capita**"),
    median_gdp_per_capita = md("**Median GDP per Capita**"),
    countries_included = md("**Countries Included**")
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(total_plastic, total_events, avg_efficiency),
    decimals = 2,
    use_seps = TRUE
  ) %>%
  fmt_currency(
    columns = c(avg_gdp_per_capita, median_gdp_per_capita),
    currency = "USD",
    decimals = 0
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = countries_included,
    decimals = 0,
    use_seps = TRUE
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(13),
    heading.title.font.weight = "bold",
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold"
  ) %>%
  opt_table_outline() %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md("A combined regional table used for modeling cleanup efficiency against GDP per capita.")
  )

region_model_data_gt
```

:::

### Linear Relationship Between Cleanup Efficiency and Volunteers
```{r}
cleanup_country_year <- plastics %>%
  mutate(
    country_clean = str_squish(country),
    country_clean = recode(
      country_clean,
      "USA" = "United States",
      "US" = "United States",
      "UK" = "United Kingdom",
      "Czech Republic" = "Czechia",
      "Republic of the Congo" = "Congo",
      "Democratic Republic of the Congo" = "DR Congo",
      "Cote D_ivoire" = "Cote d'Ivoire",
      "Taiwan_ Republic of China (ROC)" = "Taiwan",
      .default = country_clean
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    lookup_clean %>% select(country_clean, region),
    by = "country_clean"
  ) %>%
  group_by(country, country_clean, region, year) %>%
  summarise(
    total_plastic = sum(grand_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_volunteers = sum(volunteers, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_efficiency = total_plastic / total_volunteers,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(region),
    is.finite(avg_efficiency),
    total_volunteers > 0
  )

ggplot(cleanup_country_year, aes(x = total_volunteers, y = avg_efficiency)) +
  geom_bin2d() +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label = "Cleanup efficiency vs volunteers on log scales.",
    hjust = 1.05, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.2, color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Cleanup Efficiency vs Volunteers",
    x = "Total volunteers (log scale)",
    y = "Cleanup efficiency (log scale)",
    fill = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
